---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat(<scope>): <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the motivation for this feature.
Example: "As an operator, I want to be able to filter agents by OS so that I can quickly find machines running a specific distribution." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you would like to see.
Be as specific as possible about what should happen and what the expected behaviour is. -->

## Affected Component

- [ ] `keeper` (server / dashboard)
- [ ] `keepee` (agent)
- [ ] `docs`
- [ ] CI/CD / tooling

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, briefly explain why you prefer the proposed solution. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc. -->
